hd4d63ee4gc0e9g4556g87f7g263bcf529cc5: I can't believe she wanted to poison us, that she tried to put us down like dying dogs without as much as a whisper of consent!
h03ccb6e4g6251g4934g921agb3121d96a09f: I can't believe she poisoned you, tried to put you down like a dying dog without as much as a whisper of consent!
hf2136c3cga593g4de5ga682g920ec9cd286b: She thought she was doing the right thing.
hfc1fe4dcg03b6g4e93g918bgcd98d253be9d: How dare she snuff out life with as much thought as snuffing out a bloody candle?
h49c52686g1325g45e9gbe1dg371366e95ed4: Yes. Yes, I am. It's just that, had it been me... Had it been...
h2f59e4b6g68d5g474dg884dge71f3be67bed: But you handled it, and you handled it well!
h34897e65g240ag41c8gb792g8f1ee487f673: As for myself, I could quite do with a tumbler full of Waterdeep Whisky.
h72887c9dg850cg413cg9662ge4e1a6fcdddc: Anyway. We live. For the moment.
h1ff30571gde89g4384g9df1g25cc0f4c6504: How about we go find that chap Halsin little miss Poison Ivy mentioned? With a bit of luck he has the means to offer us a cure rather than a coffin.
h104617begf99dg409fgad49g401e24bc9852: But it was handled, and it was handled well.
h61e0864eg4970g4d8bg931dg87107cdfff8c: Calm down, would you? It's fine. I'm fine.
h799e76f0g37b5g43edg859ag29fd5b9d531e: I know. I know you are. And yet... A few moments more, a few different words spoken...
h36dea005gd8f4g452egbc40g3ade935ed887: Calm down, would you? It's fine. We're fine.
h1ee446f2gd4c7g4689g9ecaga2dff6574ec9: I know. I know we are. And yet... a few moments more, a few different words spoken...
hfad26e87g7348g4626ga3cdg84b552ed5d75: Throw a fit on your own time. Right now, we need to move on.
h4a303348g8d79g4a71gb99cgeefb3b14721a: It's not right to feel the cold breath of death in your neck, then move on as if it was nothing but a soothing breeze.
hcc1463fbg4296g4b90gb199gf65736c54a2d: One respects life by fighting for it, and one respects death by fearing it.
h006b6243g22b1g462agafc4g75c2b721dee1: It was one hell of a surprise, but Nettie came around.
h0c4fc57bge8d4g4a59gbb10g8e4918843da4: Yes - against her will, without rhyme or reason!
h8c22022cgcedbg4753g83cag8404c42bbb83: The only dead dog would have been her if she hadn't given in.
h450acd67g950bg4e05g9f9eg6389e738b409: A taste of her own medicine is what she deserves!
